CAMPAIGN CONTEXT: Shard C is civilization's nervous system — whoever controls the Sea of Governance controls trade, communication, and military projection across the known world. Danger here is institutional: competing merchant interests, naval authority, and shard-backed political factions all operate in the same waters. The party has cleared two shards defined by elemental and spiritual threat; Shard C will test different muscles — negotiation, information-gathering, navigating agendas. The port they occupy is a node where power is brokered openly; every vendor, official, and sailor has an interest. Maritime logistics are real constraints. Vargr's spirit-channeling may be relevant in a place layered with political history and old decisions. The party has no local reputation yet — they are anonymous, which is both vulnerability and opportunity.
